Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Completion of an in-country semiconductor prefeasibility study to map existing ecosystem and opportunities to connect into larger U.S. supply chain and participation of state stakeholders in ASU’s Semiconductor Master Class. The remaining activity to be implemented in FY27 is study tour to ASU an...
